scripts.deploy: npm run type-check && npm test && npm run lint && npm run build && git push pi develop
scripts.deploy:fast: npm run type-check && npm test && npm run lint && npm run build && bash scripts/deploy-fast.sh
scripts.deploy:hook: scp scripts/hooks/post-receive bambookpi@bamb00kpi.local:/home/bambookpi/repos/pv18.git/hooks/post-receive && ssh bambookpi@bamb00kpi.local 'chmod +x /home/bambookpi/repos/pv18.git/hooks/post-receive && echo Hook deployed OK'
